primary_function: "Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK. TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK. DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks."

authoritative: Surface selection (API vs Agent SDK vs Tool Use)
Architecture decision guidance for LLM applications
out_of_scope: Business logic unrelated to LLM integration
Data science and ML model training
Testing frameworks beyond API integration testing

suggested_aec_gates: Verify language detection logic correctly maps file extensions to programming languages
Confirm surface recommendations match the complexity and requirements described
Ensure Claude model version defaults to claude-opus-4-6 unless user specifies otherwise
Validate that adaptive thinking is recommended for complex tasks
Confirm streaming is suggested for long input/output or high max_tokens scenarios
Verify tool use examples match the detected programming language
Ensure architecture guidance aligns with the four agent criteria (complexity, value, viability, cost of error)
Confirm SDK feature support table accuracy for each language
Validate that unsupported languages are directed to cURL examples or community SDKs
trigger_text: "Build apps with the Claude API or Anthropic SDK. TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`/`claude_agent_sdk`, or user asks to use Claude API, Anthropic SDKs, or Agent SDK. DO NOT TRIGGER when: code imports `openai`/other AI SDK, general programming, or ML/data-science tasks."
